span.p: A new ML capability is needed

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Is the task language/vision-generative or open-ended
summarize, extract, converse, reason over NL?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: This is an LLM/foundation-model task

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Does a hosted general model with
a good prompt + retrieval already meet quality + latency + cost?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Prompt a hosted model + RAG -
ship fastest, no training, route to claude-app-engineering

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Do you have hundreds-plus
high-quality labeled examples of the target behavior?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Fine-tune/adapt a pretrained model -
LoRA/PEFT or a provider fine-tune

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Improve prompt/RAG/few-shot first -
collect examples before fine-tuning

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: This is a classical-ML task

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Is there a pretrained model
close to your domain to adapt?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Adapt/transfer-learn -
train only the head on your data

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Do you have enough labeled, leakage-free
training data for the target?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Train a custom model -
this is the training-pipeline-engineer's lane

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Can you get labels cheaply
heuristics, weak supervision, a hosted model as a labeler?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Bootstrap labels, then train custom

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Prompt a hosted model as a stopgap
while you build the labeled set

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: ANY choice: reproducibility + registry + no skew/leakage still apply
